channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: The battle on the propaganda front intensifies
item.description: As the US and Israel battle to control the story of their war against Iran, their messaging gets harder to defend.

item.title: Hamas urges Iran to halt attacks on Gulf, slams aggression on Tehran
item.description: The Palestinian group calls for end to Gulf attacks while supporting Tehran’s right to defend against Israel and US.

item.title: Four killed in southern Lebanon apartment after reported Israeli attack
item.description: Four killed in southern Lebanon apartment after reported Israeli attack

item.title: More than 110 people killed in Iran’s Kurdistan: Official
item.description: At least 112 killed in US-Israel attacks on Iran’s Kurdistan province, with 969 injured, local officials say.

item.title: Iran continues intensified attacks across Gulf in US-Israel war fallout
item.description: Strikes target multiple countries, including Saudi Arabia and Qatar, overnight with interceptions reported.

item.title: North Korea fires ballistic missiles as US-South Korea hold military drills
item.description: Seoul's Joint Chiefs of Staff say approximately 10 ballistic missiles were fired by Pyongyang.

item.title: US Embassy in Baghdad, Iraq attacked with missile that hits helipad
item.description: The missile attack causes damage to the mission, according to sources, as smoke is seen rising from the building.

item.title: US attacks military sites on Iran’s Kharg island, home to vast oil facility
item.description: Tehran threatens to reduce US-linked oil facilities to 'pile of ashes' if oil structures on the island are attacked.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 15 of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: US hits Iran’s Kharg island as it warns oil sites may be next if Tehran disrupts shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Yemeni ports face shipping fee hike amid Iran conflict
item.description: Yemen’s government rejects new shipping surcharges, as fears grow of humanitarian crisis.
